Hexegic

Software Developer

 
Great Malvern, England, United Kingdom · Reposted 2 weeks ago · 57 applicants

Promoted by hirer · Actively reviewing applicants

Software Developer

Hexegic · Great Malvern, England, United Kingdom (Hybrid)

Assessing your job match

About the job

The software developer will develop systems and security software for an innovative new Linux-based network security appliance. Working in a small, product focused team, you’ll develop software in a security-conscious environment with a great deal of independence and autonomy.


About us

Hexegic are a leading technical consultancy providing agile multi-disciplinary teams to high performing organisations. The company promises exciting, engaging and rewarding projects for those that are keen to develop and build a successful career.


Core Responsibilities
  • Utilise Rust and Go, writing for Linux on AMD64
  • Develop low level systems and network programming
  • Linux/Unix/POSIX systems programming
  • Program networks and protocol implementations
  • Develop network architectures for secure architecture


What we are looking for
  • Proficiency in Rust and/or Go
  • Fundamental networking knowledge, with applied experience being ideal
  • Computer science degree or similar background


What’s in it for you?
  • Base salary of £70,000-£95,000
  • £5000 a year professional development budget
  • Wellness program
  • 25 days annual leave
  • Hybrid working arrangements


Please note that successful candidates must be eligible for UK security clearance to a high government standard.

About the company

Hexegic
13,898 followers
IT Services and IT Consulting 51-200 employees 78 on LinkedIn

At Hexegic we are not just passionate about protecting data through our Cyber services we are passionate about helping companies release the potential of the data they hold through our interlinked Data services.

Data is primacy in the modern world and with so many organisations either on the journey to digital transformation or having already realised it there is no better time to get to grips with your organisations data requirements and realise its potential.

We provide Governments and high performing businesses the tools and resources empowering them to safely achieve their mission.

Cyber, Risk and Intelligence

Key Services
• Risk Assessment
• Incident Response
• Managed Services
• Barrier Model Consultancy
• Application Assurance
• Doctrinal Development
• Analysis Training and Capacity Building
• Open-Source Intelligence
• Intelligence Model Development

Data Science, Data Engineering and Analytics

We believe in a multi-disciplinary approach to data science and engineering and our experts come from a diverse range of backgrounds in fields such as software development, anthropology, finance, civil service, and mathematics.

With this approach we have successfully built cohesive teams with broad experiences that can not only manipulate and derive intelligence from data but also speak the language of the operational business teams they support.
As such we now support data transformation projects in some of the largest organisations in the UK.

We offer services in.
• Data Analysis
• Data Development
• Data Modelling
• Data Machine Learning
• Data Engineering/Pipeline
• Data Testing
…

Career growth and learning

Hexegic consider professional development and continuous learning as a key pillar of the business. …
